title: KandyToys Classic Train Set | 2.4m Track | Headlight | Battery Operated
features: Timeless Nostalgia: Step back in time with our classic toy train set that captures the charm and nostalgia of vintage locomotives and railway journeys.

Classic Toy Train Experience: Unleash your imagination with a comprehensive train set including locomotive, coal tender, express rail carriage and realistic tracks. Plus there is a working full beam front headlight!
Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, this train set is built to withstand hours of play, ensuring it becomes a cherished heirloom for generations
Easy Setup: Quickly assemble the tracks and watch your train come to life. Our easy-to-connect pieces ensure hassle-free setup, making it perfect for both beginners and seasoned enthusiast
description: Step back in time with our classic toy train set that captures the charm and nostalgia of vintage locomotives and railway journeys. This set includes a locomotive, coal tender, express rail carriage and 2.4m of realistic tracks, plus there's a working full beam front headlight on the train! Requires 2 x 1.5v AA Batteries. Age 3 Years +
